scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { if (fs.existsSync(f)) fs.rmSync(f); } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.ci:check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run smoke:api
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
